Member Function Documentation

◆ geometry()

virtual IGeometry* IGeometryMng::geometry ( IMesh *  mesh = NULL)
pure virtual

Get underlying geometry.

Null value argument is given for retro compatibility (return default geometry for default mesh)

◆ unregisterMesh()

virtual void IGeometryMng::unregisterMesh ( IMesh *  mesh)
pure virtual

Remove geometry reference to a given mesh.

Used for deleted sub-meshes
